entries.summary: Built an AI-powered MDCAT preparation platform serving 10,000+ students with adaptive testing, personalized study plans, and performance analytics.
contributions: Designed adaptive testing engine with real-time difficulty adjustment
Built AI study planner based on weak-area analysis
Implemented gamification with streaks, badges, and leaderboards
Deployed as PWA with Firebase backend and Cloud Functions

entries.summary: Django-based platform for university societies to manage events, memberships, and student engagement with role-based dashboards.
contributions: Co-developed frontend with role-aware society and event management UI
Implemented JWT-authenticated dashboards for students, handlers, and admins
Built event RSVP, discussion, and feedback interfaces

entries.summary: Local-first offline classroom platform enabling chat, file sharing, and calls without internet using peer-to-peer connectivity.
contributions: Implemented Google Nearby Connections for offline discovery
Designed star-topology message rebroadcasting for classroom networks
